text: The subject property consists of a two-unit retail/service commercial building containing approximately 5,580 square feet of gross building area situated on a 7,405 square foot (0.17 acre) site in Danvers, Illinois. Originally constructed in 1914, the improvements reflect traditional downtown commercial development with high site coverage and minimal setbacks consistent with surrounding properties. The building is currently utilized as a motorcycle repair and retail sales establishment and includes a combination of service bay space and retail storefront area. Interior finishes vary by suite and include commercial vinyl tile flooring in the retail area and open service space with exposed structural elements in the rear workshop area. Ceiling heights in the service area appear to be approximately 11 to 12 feet with exposed steel framing and insulated ceiling covering. The property appears to be functionally adequate for continued retail/service use and is consistent with the permitted uses under the C-1 Commercial zoning designation.
